docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-22-2012 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-22-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-22-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. MARIA ZAMUDIO INTERPRETS ENGLISH/SPANISH - SPANISH/ENGLISH ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF QUIAL, CARLOS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT THOMAS, RICHARD STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-05-2012 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO FEB-22-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PROOF OF SERVICE FILED IN COURT TODAY. DEFENDANT AGREED THAT HE WAS SERVED; DEFENDANT SAID HE HAD IMPORTANT WITNESSES TO BRING TO COURT AND HE WAS GOING TO BE UNAVAILABLE UNTIL FEBRUARY 2012. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,040.00 FILED BY QUIAL, CARLOS AS TO DEFENDANT THOMAS, RICHARD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-05-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-22-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT THOMAS, RICHARD
